subject: Need board deck updates before 6 PM
body: Team, we need the Q3 board deck updated with the revised churn metrics before 6 PM today. Please confirm owner and ETA.
thread: Earlier today: Please include customer retention slide.
Yesterday: Finance asked for corrected ARR values.

subject: Schedule kickoff next Tuesday
body: Can we schedule a 45 minute kickoff next Tuesday at 11:00 AM IST with your implementation lead and product manager?
thread: We would like to discuss milestones and ownership.
Please share the calendar invite once confirmed.
